---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with an existing Crucible agent
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Agent name**
<!-- Which agent produced the problem? e.g., compliance-officer, drawdown-monitor -->


**Command used**
<!-- The exact slash command, e.g., /compliance -->


**What you provided as input**
<!-- Paste the full input you gave the agent -->


**What the agent produced**
<!-- Paste the relevant portion of the agent's output -->


**What you expected**
<!-- What verdict or finding should the agent have produced, and why? -->


**Issue type**
<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] Wrong verdict (the verdict stamp was incorrect)
- [ ] Missing check (the agent should have flagged something it didn't)
- [ ] Formula error (the agent's calculation or threshold is wrong)
- [ ] Output format (the agent didn't follow the structured output format)
- [ ] Other
